dict.string: Ember uses the camera so you can photograph a meal and estimate its macros. This is optional — you can pick an existing photo instead, and Ember never uploads photos anywhere except to estimate macros via the Anthropic API with your own key.

Ember can read your workouts, body weight, steps, distance, active energy, heart rate, heart-rate variability, VO₂max, blood oxygen, sleep, and mindful minutes from Apple Health so your coach and progress reflect real data. Reading is optional — deny it and Ember works fully on data you enter manually. Ember only reads and never writes to Health.
Ember sends optional reminders for meals and hydration at times you choose. The app is fully usable without them.
